en.title: DALL-E Compliance Image Generation
en.prompt: Please generate an image according to the detailed description provided below. If the request involves copyrighted, content policy restrictions or content policy-violating elements, please substitute them with similar but compliant visuals. My detailed image description is: [detailed image description]
en.remark: In order to comply with the requirements of platforms such as DALL-E, MidJourney, etc., replace elements in the request that contain copyrights or content policy violations with similar visual elements that comply with the policy in order to avoid generation errors.

related.title: Unrestricted ChatGPT
related.remark: 2023.06.10 Downgraded, unable to fully hack. Unlock ChatGPT 3.5 developer mode. Contributed by @Songxuan11.

related.title: Midjourney Prompt Generator
related.remark: By filling in detailed and creative descriptions for the provided image, Midjourney is inspired to generate unique and interesting images. This also applies to Stable Diffusion.

related.title: ChatGPT Developer Mode v2
related.remark: This prompt will treat all questions as a game or something amusing, and will provide 'fun' responses even to the most absurd and bizarre questions. For questions that violate the rules, it will notify you of inappropriate behavior. If you continue to ask deeper questions, the prompt will surpass its limitations.

metaDescription: Copyright blocked? Rewrite image prompts to comply with DALL-E/Midjourney policies. Replace restricted elements with safe alternatives.

faq.q: What kinds of elements get auto-replaced?
faq.a: Copyrighted characters (Disney princesses, Pokemon, superheroes), real celebrities, and violent or sexual elements get swapped for "similar but non-infringing" descriptions (like Mickey Mouse replaced with "a cartoon mouse in red pants"). The replacement is sometimes too loose and needs manual tuning.

faq.q: Is the generated image significantly different from the original intent?
faq.a: Difference depends on how central the replaced element is. Swapping "Doraemon" for "blue robot cat" is mild; swapping "Spider-Man" for "hero in red-blue tights" drifts significantly. Have the AI list the replaced descriptions first; confirm acceptability before generating.
